full_quote:
Kyle is one of most talented and responsible guys I have worked with. On the Yoma team, Kyle played a key role in filling gaps between business and development team. With his leadership, his team always creatively and successfully delivered what we needed as a dev team. He always thinks about each and every perspective so the development team understands the application quickly through his UX designs, and the way he make uses different platforms like Atlassian to communicate is outstanding. 
He is a very good team player that understands the situation and cooperates with other team members. He was always open to listen and consider new ideas - I've never seen him decline to hear any suggestion from the dev team. He believes in quality work and was always committed to fulfilling his team's deadlines. It was a great learning experience working with him. Really looking forward to work with him again.
